name: remember_fact
description: Store a key-value fact in your holographic memory. Facts persist across dispatch cycles. Use this to remember things you'll want to recall later — source states, check results, decisions made, context that would otherwise be lost when your homelogfull rolls over. Facts recalled 3+ times across sessions are promoted to permanent context automatically.

key.description: Short descriptive key for this fact (e.g. 'dua_breach_status', 'last_govuk_check', 'gap_l06_state')

value.description: The value to store — be specific and datestamped where relevant

nugget.description: Optional: which memory store to use (default: 'default'). Use different nuggets for different topics (e.g. 'aion_research', 'monitoring').
